testcase.name: providerSelection > builds a stored provider config that preserves the provider catalog shape
providerSelection > keeps runtime model-provider generation keyed by auth type
providerSelection > uses the static mistral model list when fetchModels is false
providerSelection > returns undefined for a missing or blank stored provider apiKey
providerSelection > prompts for api key when provider supports keys but none is stored
providerSelection > prompts for api key for NVIDIA NIM when none is stored
